headline: Is Williams Sonoma (WSM) Pricing In Too Much Future Growth After Its Strong Multi Year Run
summary: Wondering if Williams-Sonoma at around US$204.98 is a bargain or already pricing in high expectations? This article focuses squarely on what the current share price might reflect. The stock has recently recorded returns of 0.7% over 7 days, 9.9% over 30 days, 9.1% year to date, and 31.8% over 1 year, with a 3 year return of 243.6% and a 5 year return of 165.5%. These moves are playing out against ongoing interest in consumer discretionary stocks and changing expectations around household...
